summary: ADR-0001 already contains the Repository Map section with all four tracks mapped to their external repos (omniverse-api-core-tests-srtx-api-test for API Tests and Benchmark, omniverse-mega-dev for Mega Integration small/large). .fleet-testing.yaml already has external_repo fields on all four tracks and external_path fields on mega_small and mega_large pointing to blueprints/mega/mega-simulation. All changes were committed in prior runs on this branch.
